auth.signUpSuccessMessage: Check your inbox for email verification!

hubs.title: HUBS
hubs.empty: No hubs yet. Create one to start adding rooms and uploading PDFs!

rooms.title: Books & Docs
rooms.empty: This Hub is empty. Upload a PDF textbook or document to start!
rooms.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{title}}"?

chat.waitForResponse: Please wait for the current response to finish.
chat.waitForConnection: Waiting for internet connection to continue.
chat.offline: You are offline. Rya will reconnect automatically.
chat.reportMessage: Was this response unsafe or incorrect?
chat.reportFailedMessage: Could not submit the report right now.
chat.errorUnexpected: The stream ended unexpectedly. Please retry.
chat.errorConnectionLost: Connection lost while streaming. We will sync again when you are back online.
chat.offlineRetryMessage: Reconnect to the internet before retrying.

processing.title: Unlocking Knowledge
processing.message: Our AI is currently reading the document, extracting core concepts, and constructing the master Knowledge Graph. This is a CPU-intensive process and may take a few minutes for complex textbooks.

error.title: Processing Failed
error.message: We encountered an error while restructuring the knowledge graph for your document. Please try creating a new room with a smaller file.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
